CORRECTED DECLARTION OF MARY E. MAYO IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND FIRST AND SECOND SETS OF REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FOR SANCTIONS FILED BY DEFENDANT ABITSCH & ABITSCH LLC

DISCOVERY 612, DEFENDANT ABITSCH & ABITSCH, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND FIRST AND SECOND SETS OF REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT DARUKA WANIGATUNGA, BOTH INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS CAFE COCOMO'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant Abitsch & Abitsch, LLC's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories And First And Second Sets Of Request For Production Of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant Daruka Wanigatunga, both individually and doing business as Cafe Cocomo's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant Daruka Wanigatunga, both individually and doing business as Cafe Cocomo, are ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant Daruka Wanigatunga, both individually and doing business as Cafe Cocomo in the amount of $1,050, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Off Calendar May-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Juan Garcia's Motion To Compel Response To Form Interrogatories And Document Demand is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $350, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
